perturbation.original_text: Athens Bancshares Corporation, a Tennessee corporation (the "Company"), and Athens Federal Community Bank, a federal savings bank located in Athens, Tennessee (the "Bank") (references to the "Bank" include the Bank in mutual or stock form as indicated by the context), the deposit accounts of which are insured by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation ("FDIC"), hereby confirm their agreement with Keefe, Bruyette & Woods, Inc. (the "Agent") as follows:
perturbation.changed_text: Athens Bancshares Corporation, a Tennessee corporation (the "Company"), and Athens Federal Community Bank, a federal savings bank located in Athens, Tennessee (the "Financial Institution") (references to the "Bank" include the Bank in mutual or stock form as indicated by the context), the deposit accounts of which are insured by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation ("FDIC"), hereby confirm their agreement with Keefe, Bruyette & Woods, Inc. (the "Agent") as follows:
perturbation.explanation: The key term 'Bank' is initially defined and subsequently replaced with 'Financial Institution.' This creates an in-text contradiction as subsequent references to 'Bank' may or may not be referring to the Athens Federal Community Bank, causing confusion about its role and obligations. This uncertainty impacts the obligations and representations detailed throughout the agreement, especially those exclusively assigned to the 'Bank'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Company and the Bank jointly and severally represent and warrant to and agree with the Agent as follows: (a) The Registration Statement which was prepared by the Company and the Bank and filed with the Commission has been declared effective by the Commission, no stop order has been issued with respect thereto and no proceedings therefor have been initiated or, to the knowledge of the Company or the Bank, threatened by the Commission. At the time the Registration Statement, including the Prospectus contained therein (including any amendment or supplement), became effective, at the Applicable Time (as defined in Section 4(c) hereof) and at the Closing Date, the Registration Statement complied and will comply in all material respects with the requirements of the 1933 Act and the 1933 Act Regulations and the Registration Statement, including the Prospectus contained therein (including any amendment or supplement thereto), and any information regarding the Company contained in Sales Information (as such term is defined in Section 9(a) hereof) authorized by the Company for use in connection with the Offering, did not contain an untrue statement of a material fact or omit to state a material fact required to be stated therein or necessary to make the statements therein, in light of the circumstances under which they were made, not misleading, and at the time any Rule 424 (b) or (c) Prospectus is filed with the Commission and at the Closing Date referred to in Section 2 hereof, the Prospectus (including any amendment or supplement thereto) and any information regarding the Company contained in Sales Information (as such term is defined in Section 9(a) hereof) authorized by the Company for use in connection with the Offering will contain all statements that are required to be stated therein in accordance with the 1933 Act and the 1933 Act Regulations and will not contain an untrue statement of a material fact or omit to state a material fact necessary in order to make the statements therein, in light of the circumstances under which they were made, not misleading; provided, however, that the representations and warranties in this Section 4(a) shall not apply to statements or omissions made in reliance upon and in conformity with written information furnished to the Company by the Agent or its counsel expressly regarding the Agent for use in the Prospectus under the caption "The Conversion and Stock Offering — Marketing Arrangements" or statements in or omissions from any Sales Information or information filed pursuant to state securities or blue sky laws or regulations regarding the Agent.
perturbation.justification: The original text defines 'Bank' as 'Athens Federal Community Bank.' The changed text replaces 'Bank' with 'Financial Institution' in the definition. The contradicted text states 'The Company and the Bank jointly and severally represent and warrant...' This creates a contradiction because it's no longer clear if 'Athens Federal Community Bank' is making the representations and warranties, since the definition of 'Bank' has been altered, and it is unclear if 'Financial Institution' includes 'Athens Federal Community Bank' or some other entity. This aligns with the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction' as the interchangeable use of 'Bank' and 'Financial Institution' without clear definition leads to conflicting obligations.

perturbation.original_text: All fees or expenses due to the Agent but unpaid will be payable to the Agent in next day funds at the earlier of the Closing Date (as hereinafter defined) or the End Date.
perturbation.changed_text: All fees or expenses due to the Agent but unpaid will be payable to the Agent in United States Dollars at the earlier of the Closing Date (as hereinafter defined) or the End Date.
perturbation.explanation: The phrase 'next day funds' which implieds an immediate transfer, is replaced with 'United States Dollars' which is less specific and does not enforce a time frame, which changes the expectation of when payments should be settled, this introduces ambiguity. It now unclear when the funds will actually arrive to the Agent. This creates an in-text contradiction as it goes against industry practices of providing instant funds.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The closing for the sale of the Shares shall take place on the Closing Date at such location as mutually agreed upon by the Agent and the Company and the Bank. At the closing, the Company and the Bank shall deliver to the Agent in next day funds the commissions, fees and expenses due and owing to the Agent as set forth in Sections 2 and 7 hereof and the opinions and certificates required hereby and other documents deemed reasonably necessary by the Agent shall be executed and delivered to effect the sale of the Shares as contemplated hereby and pursuant to the terms of the Prospectus.
perturbation.justification: The original text specified payment in 'next day funds,' ensuring immediate transfer. The changed text replaces this with 'United States Dollars,' which introduces ambiguity regarding the timing of payment. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which explicitly requires payment 'in next day funds' at the closing. The change removes a specific requirement (immediate funds) and replaces it with a general one (currency type), making the contract internally inconsistent and potentially unenforceable regarding the timing of payment to the Agent. This aligns with the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction' because the terminology around payment timing is misaligned.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement may also be terminated by mutual written consent of the parties hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement may also be terminated by mutual verbal consent of the parties hereto.
perturbation.explanation: The original text specifies 'mutual written consent', which is standard for legal agreements, providing a documented record. The modified text changes this to 'mutual verbal consent'. This introduces an in-text contradiction as it goes against standard legal practices requiring agreements to be documented in writing, because 'verbal' can be hard to be proven in Court.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement, including schedules and exhibits hereto, which are integral parts hereof and incorporated as though set forth in full, constitutes the entire agreement between the parties pertaining to the subject matter hereof superseding any and all prior or contemporaneous oral or prior written agreements, proposals, letters of intent and understandings, and cannot be modified, changed, waived or terminated except by a writing which expressly states that it is an amendment, modification or waiver, refers to this Agreement and is signed by the party to be charged. No course of conduct or dealing shall be construed to modify, amend or otherwise affect any of the provisions hereof.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'written consent' with 'verbal consent' for contract termination. The contradicted text explicitly states that the agreement can only be modified or terminated by a 'writing'. This creates a direct and irreconcilable contradiction because verbal consent directly opposes the requirement for written modification or termination, making it unenforceable. The change effectively breaks the 'entire agreement' clause, where all modifications have to be in writing, based on the provided Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction definition.
